api.description: Password field with show/hide toggle and strength meter.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the underlying password <input> on first render. See Input.AutoFocus for why the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-input density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the field height shifts between values.

mdSummary:
# PasswordInput

Password field with show/hide toggle and strength meter.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Inputs
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/password-input

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PasswordInput | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | ShowStrength | `bool` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | ShowToggle | `bool` | `true` |  |
| PasswordInput | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | AutoFocus | `bool` | `` | Focuses the underlying password <input> on first render. See Input.AutoFocus for why the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM. |
| PasswordInput | Density | `Density?` | `` | Per-input density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the field height shifts between values. |
| PasswordInput | InheritedDensity | `Density?` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)
- `InheritedDensity` (`Density?`)

```razor
<PasswordInput />
```
